# AstroAligned — Where Zodiac Meets BaZi
> Daily horoscopes, BaZi (Four Pillars) guides, elemental wisdom, and cross-cultural astrology insights.

## Key Content

### Daily Horoscopes
- Daily Horoscope (June 20, 2026): https://astro.aliandesign.com/2026/06/daily-horoscope-june-20/
- Daily Horoscope (June 19, 2026): https://astro.aliandesign.com/2026/06/daily-horoscope-june-19/
- Weekly Horoscope (July 13–19): https://astro.aliandesign.com/2026/06/weekly-horoscope-july-13-19/
- All Daily Astrology: https://astro.aliandesign.com/categories/daily-astrology/

### BaZi (Four Pillars of Destiny)
- Fire Element Signs in BaZi: https://astro.aliandesign.com/2026/06/fire-element-signs/
- All BaZi Guides: https://astro.aliandesign.com/categories/bazi/

### Elements & Compatibility
- All Elements Content: https://astro.aliandesign.com/categories/elements-compatibility/

### Tools
- Chart+ (Interactive BaZi Calculator): https://astro.aliandesign.com/chart-plus/

## About
AstroAligned bridges Western Zodiac and Chinese BaZi. We offer dual-system horoscopes, elemental analysis, and cross-cultural astrology education — all in one place.
